code: import React,{useEffect,useState}from'react';import axios from'axios';import{jsx as _jsx,jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";const Users=_ref=>{let{token}=_ref;const[users,setUsers]=useState([]);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);const[error,setError]=useState('');useEffect(()=>{const fetchUsers=async()=>{try{const res=await axios.get('/api/admin/users',{headers:{Authorization:`Bearer ${token}`}});setUsers(res.data);setLoading(false);}catch(err){setError('Failed to load users');setLoading(false);}};fetchUsers();},[token]);if(loading)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{children:"Loading users..."});if(error)return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("div",{style:{color:'red'},children:error});return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("h3",{children:"Users"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("table",{border:"1",cellPadding:"5",style:{borderCollapse:'collapse',width:'100%'},children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("thead",{children:/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Phone"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"National ID"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("th",{children:"Registered"})]})}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("tbody",{children:users.map(user=>/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("tr",{children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:user.id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:user.phone}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:user.national_id}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("td",{children:new Date(user.registered_at).toLocaleString()})]},user.id))})]})]});};export default Users;
